scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openoutlier/core && npm run build -w @openoutlier/storage && npm run build -w @openoutlier/api && npm run build -w @openoutlier/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @openoutlier/api && npm run lint -w @openoutlier/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @openoutlier/core && npm run test -w @openoutlier/api
